final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input ce,
    input [31:0] din0,
    input [31:0] din1,
    output reg [31:0] dout
);always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            dout <= 0;
        end else if (ce) begin
            dout <= din0 * din1;
        end
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      dout <= ~din0 & ~din1;
    end
  end

endmodule
